# Secret patterns to block from commits
# Used by pre-commit hook to prevent accidental secret exposure

# API Keys
sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}
UPBIT_ACCESS_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}
UPBIT_SECRET_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}
DISCORD_TOKEN=[a-zA-Z0-9._-]{50,}
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{50,}

# Generic patterns
[Aa][Pp][Ii]_?[Kk][Ee][Yy]\s*=\s*["']?[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{20,}["']?
[Ss][Ee][Cc][Rr][Ee][Tt]_?[Kk][Ee][Yy]\s*=\s*["']?[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{20,}["']?
[Pp][Aa][Ss][Ss][Ww][Oo][Rr][Dd]\s*=\s*["'][^"']{8,}["']

# Private keys
-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY-----
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

# AWS
AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}

# Google
AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}
